app.title: AllisWell
app.tagline: Tasks, projects, notes, calendar and reminders — self-hosted.

nav.homeDesc: Everything at a glance — overdue, today and beyond.
nav.inboxDesc: Capture thoughts fast — they stay out of Home until planned.
nav.calendarDesc: Your month, one day at a time.
nav.projectsDesc: Projects with colors, tasks, notes and documents.
nav.notesDesc: Rich notes, linkable to tasks and projects.

auth.name: Name (optional)
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.toLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

settings.title: Settings
settings.privateNotificationsSub: Hide task titles in reminders and alarms

alarms.title: Urgent alarms
alarms.off: Notifications are off — alarms cannot ring. Tap to fix.
alarms.exact: Tap to grant "Alarms & reminders" so alarms ring exactly on time.
alarms.readyCritical: Ready — rings even when the phone is on silent.
alarms.ready: Ready — breaks through Sleep and Focus modes. If the mute switch is on, iOS plays no sound.

settings.aboutBody: Open-source, self-hosted productivity hub — tasks, projects, notes, calendar and reminders.

home.allCaughtUpBody: No open tasks — capture one in the Inbox.

task.title: Title
task.noProjectsHint: No projects yet — create one in the Projects tab
task.urgentAlarmSub: Insistent reminder that must be acknowledged
task.showInCalendarOnSub: Adds a block to your connected calendar
task.showInCalendarOffSub: Add a date below and it will appear
task.noTagsYet: No tags in this workspace yet.

inbox.captureBody: Type above and sort later — captures never show on Home until you plan them.
inbox.convertBody: This capture moves to Notes as a new note.

project.deleteBody: "{name}" will be removed. Its tasks stay in the workspace.
project.noReadme: No README yet — the note that opens with this project, like a repo home page.
project.emptyReadme: Empty README — open it with the pencil to start writing.
project.addTaskHint: Add a task to this project…
project.noOpenTasks: No open tasks in this project
project.noNotesBody: No notes attached to this project yet
project.name: Name
project.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
project.archiveBody: It leaves the active list. Choose what to take with it.
project.unarchiveBody: It returns to the active list. Choose what to restore.
project.restoreAllNote: Restores ALL archived tasks and notes of this project.
project.archiveConnNeeded: Archiving with its tasks/notes needs a connection.
project.createFirst: Create your first project with the + button.

note.archivedHere: Archived notes land here for safekeeping.
note.captureFirst: Capture the first one with the + button.

calendar.notSetUpServer: Google Calendar is not set up on this server
calendar.notSetUpYet: Google Calendar is not set up on this server yet.
calendar.reauthLong: Google needs you to sign in again. Disconnect and reconnect.
calendar.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.
calendar.couldNotCheckGoogle: Could not check your calendar connection.
calendar.googleBlurb: Show your tasks as blocks, and see changes you make there
calendar.googleSignedOut: Google signed you out. Disconnect and connect again.
calendar.disconnectSub: Events already in your calendar stay there
calendar.reauthShort: Google needs you to sign in again.
calendar.appleBlocked: Blocked — allow calendar access in system Settings
calendar.appleFullAccess: AllisWell needs full calendar access to keep events in sync
calendar.appleBlurb: Show your tasks as events in your Apple Calendar

tour.welcomeBody: A 30-second tour of the essentials. You can skip it anytime.
tour.homeBody: Your day in one chronological list — overdue, dateless work, today, and the next 30 days. Quick-add at the top; the + button opens the full form.
tour.inboxBody: Capture a thought fast. It stays here — out of Home — until you plan it, so nothing gets lost and nothing clutters your day.
tour.calendarBody: Your month at a glance. Connect a calendar in Settings and your own events show up beside your tasks.
tour.projectsBody: Group work with a color and a README overview, with its own tasks and notes. Archive a project when it is done.
tour.notesBody: Rich notes you can pin, archive, and link to tasks and projects.
tour.doneBody: Reopen this tour anytime from Settings → App tour.

error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.AUTH_EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists.
error.NETWORK_ERROR: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and the server address.

sync.noteConflict: Note edited elsewhere — your version was kept as a conflicted copy.
sync.fieldsOverridden: Some changes were overridden by a newer edit ({fields}).
sync.rejected: A change was rejected by the server{code}.
sync.conflicted: A change conflicted with a newer edit and was not applied.
